nasb.text: Therefore encourage one another and build up one another, just as you also are doing.

esv.text: Therefore encourage one another and build one another up, just as you are doing.

cnv.text: 所以，你們應該彼此勸慰，互相造就，正如你們一向所行的。

ccb.text: 所以，你们要彼此鼓励、互相造就，正如你们一向所做的。

csbs.text: 因此，你们要彼此鼓励，互相造就，就像你们现在所做的那样。
